description: Asana is a work management platform for organizing projects, tasks, teams, and workflows. Its APIs and MCP server expose Asana workspace data and actions for integrations and AI assistants.
summary: Asana exposes a REST API at `https://app.asana.com/api/1.0` with OpenAPI, plus an official MCP server at `https://mcp.asana.com/v2/mcp` over streamable HTTP; both require authentication.
